title: Specklinia clandestina
taxonomy: Specklinia clandestina is a species of orchid in the genus Specklinia. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. Within the Orchidaceae family, Specklinia clandestina is classified as a member of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae. This subtribe is a group of terrestrial orchids that are primarily found in Central and South America. Specklinia clandestina is further classified within the genus Specklinia, which is a group of small, delicate orchids.
